name: Accra Psychiatric Hospital
capability: null
organizationdescription: Accra Psychiatric Hospital is a public mental health facility serving the community in Ghana. The hospital's mission is to provide comprehensive mental health care services to individuals in need. With a focus on optimizing mental health and improving function in society, the hospital offers various support groups, including Alcoholics Anonymous and narcotics anonymous, for people living with chronic mental health conditions. The hospital's history and commitment to providing quality care have established it as a vital resource for the community, providing essential services to those affected by mental health issues.
description: Accra Psychiatric Hospital is a mental health facility providing a range of services including outpatient services, 24-hour emergency care, in-patient services, clinical psychology services, electroconvulsive therapy, laboratory services, and pharmacy services. The hospital also offers specialized services such as occupational therapy, social work services, community psychiatry nursing services, and drug treatment and rehabilitation. With 15 wards and a capacity to accommodate 600 patients, the hospital is currently operating with 300 beds due to Covid-19 restrictions.

The polyclinic is equipped to handle routine medical checks, vaccinations, and minor surgical procedures.

capability: ["Tertiary referral centre and teaching hospital located in Kumasi, Ghana","Postal address: P.O. Box 1934, Kumasi, Ghana","Phone: +233 24 390 0598","Email: info@kath.gov.gh","Website: kath.gov.gh","Philosophy: Aims to provide world class medical services with a patient-centred mindset"]
organizationdescription: Komfo Anokye Teaching Hospital is a major healthcare facility located in Kumasi, the capital of the Ashanti Region in Ghana. The hospital is governed by a Board comprising non-executive and executive members, as well as the Dean of the School of Medical Sciences. Established under the Ghana Health Services and Teaching Hospitals Act 525, 1996, the hospital serves a population of over 5 million people in the Ashanti Region and beyond, providing medical care and education to the community.
description: Komfo Anokye Teaching Hospital is a tertiary referral centre providing specialized medical services, including emergency care, surgery, and outpatient clinics. As a teaching hospital, it offers a wide range of medical specialties and subspecialties, and is a major hub for medical education and training. The hospital provides advanced care in various fields, including maternity services, and serves as a referral centre for complex cases from surrounding regions.

FACILITY: Akatsi South Municipal Hospital
LOCATION: Akatsi, Volta
TYPE: hospital
SPECIALTIES: psychiatry, gynecologyAndObstetrics, pediatrics, dentistry, otolaryngology, ophthalmology, endocrinologyAndDiabetesAndMetabolism, infectiousDiseases, pathology, radiology, publicHealth, internalMedicine
PROCEDURES: Provides outpatient (OPD) services, Provides inpatient services, Provides laboratory services, Provides pharmacy and dispensing services, Provides ART (antiretroviral therapy) services, Provides public health services, Specialized units include Dental, ENT and Eye, Mental health services are provided, Maternal and child health services are provided, Laboratory, Laboratory Services, Dispensary, Child Health
EQUIPMENT: Laboratory Equipment, Microscope, Centrifuge
CAPABILITIES: Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, Out-patient (OPD) services are provided, Inpatient services are provided, Laboratory services are provided, Pharmacy and dispensing services are provided, ART services are provided, Public health services are provided, Diabetes/Hypertension (DM/HPT) clinic is available, Wellness clinic is available, Breast and cervical screening units are available, Upgraded to Municipal status in 2021, Hospital manager is Mawuli Asimenu, Dental Care
DESCRIPTION: Akatsi South Municipal Hospital was established as a dental clinic in 1996. It was upgraded to a health center in 1996. It was again upgraded to a district hospital in 2007 and further upgraded to Municipal status in the year 2021. Our mission is to provide compassionate holistic health-care to promote healing, foster innovation and empower our diverse community to achieve optimal well-being.

capability: ["Located at JPRQ+HX Accra, Tantra Hill, Accra","Has 87 French and Ghanaian medical professionals available 24/7","Emergency services operate 24/7","Overall bed capacity of 39 beds (VIP and common wards)","Three paediatric wards (including one VIP) in the paediatric section","Delivery ward and lying-in ward","In-Vitro Fertilization (IVF) Unit","NHIS and other private insurance clients welcome","Departments include Medical & Emergency; Surgery; Cosmetic & Reconstructive Surgery; Paediatrics; Dentistry; Ophthalmology; Fertility & IVF Center; Gynaeco-Obstetric; Clinical Laboratory","Urologist on staff","Physiotherapist; Optometrists; Dentists available"]
organizationdescription: Aneeja Hospital is a healthcare facility co-founded by a consultant surgeon and a paediatrician, with a team of 87 French and Ghanaian medical professionals. The hospital's mission is to provide quality medical care to its community, with a team of general practitioners, surgeons, anaesthetists, and other specialists. The hospital serves both Ghanaians and foreigners, offering a range of medical services to meet the needs of its diverse patient base.
description: Aneeja Hospital is a French-English hospital providing a range of medical services, including surgery, paediatrics, gynaecology, urology, physiotherapy, optometry, dentistry, and midwifery. The hospital has two operating theatres, an IVF unit, a well-equipped laboratory, medical imaging services, and a treatment room. It offers inpatient care with a capacity of thirty-nine beds, including VIP and common wards, as well as a delivery and lying-in ward. The hospital welcomes patients with NHIS and private insurance, offering the same rates to Ghanaians and foreigners.

name: Ares Centre of Excellence
capability: ["Functions as a specialist referral hospital and medical logistics services provider","Operates in Ghana at the International Maritime Hospital, Tema","Headquartered in Romania with partnerships in thirteen cities","Has a publicly listed contact phone number +233 24 395 5981"]
organizationdescription: Ares Centre of Excellence is a medical services provider dedicated to delivering specialized healthcare in Ghana. With a presence at the International Maritime Hospital, the organization aims to serve the community by providing access to advanced medical care and logistics services. The centre's mission is to improve health outcomes for patients who have had their conditions complicated by initial treatment, and to provide a higher level of care to those in need.
description: Ares Centre of Excellence is a specialist referral hospital providing medical logistics services, operating at the International Maritime Hospital in Ghana. The facility offers specialized medical care, with a focus on managing complex conditions that may have been worsened by initial treatment at other health facilities. Key medical services include emergency care, surgery, and outpatient clinics, with a goal of delivering high-quality care to patients.

organizationdescription: Asamang Seventh-day Adventist Hospital is a healthcare facility established in 1984 as part of the Greater Kumasi Ghana Union Conference. The hospital serves the local community, providing medical care to individuals and families. With a history spanning over three decades, the hospital has become a trusted healthcare provider in the region. The hospital's mission is to provide quality healthcare services to the community, and it has been serving the healthcare needs of the local population since its inception. The hospital is owned and operated by a faith-based organization, reflecting the values of compassion, care, and service to the community.
description: Asamang Seventh-day Adventist Hospital is a district hospital providing emergency care, surgery, maternity services, and outpatient clinics. The hospital offers a range of medical services, including general medicine, pediatrics, and obstetrics. It has a team of skilled healthcare professionals who provide quality care to patients. The hospital's facilities include operating theaters, maternity wards, and outpatient departments, ensuring that patients receive comprehensive care. The hospital's services cater to the needs of the local community, providing accessible healthcare to those in need.

organizationdescription: Bechem Government Hospital is a public, not-for-profit healthcare facility located in the Tano South District of the Ahafo Region. The hospital was established in 1950 as a Maternity Home and was later handed over to the Ministry of Health in 1978. It operates as a secondary healthcare facility, serving the local community and surrounding areas. The hospital aims to provide quality healthcare services to its patients and stakeholders, including patients, visitors, corporate organizations, and staff. Its mission and vision statements align with the Ghana Health Service, focusing on delivering excellent healthcare and customer satisfaction.
description: Bechem Government Hospital is a District hospital providing emergency care, surgery, maternity services, and outpatient clinics. The hospital has a 155-bed capacity and serves as a referral hospital for sub-district health facilities, with an average daily attendance of around 366 patients. It offers a range of medical services, including secondary care, and is the main health facility for the Tano South District Health Insurance Scheme.

doc_text:
FACILITY: Britannia Medical Centre
LOCATION: Tema, Greater Accra
TYPE: hospital
SPECIALTIES: internalMedicine, generalSurgery, gynecologyAndObstetrics, emergencyMedicine, reproductiveEndocrinologyAndInfertility, radiology, pediatrics, familyMedicine, dentistry, physicalMedicineAndRehabilitation, pathology, urology, orthopedicSurgery
PROCEDURES: Antenatal clinics are run twice weekly with ultramodern ultrasound support, 18–22 week detailed fetal ultrasound examination is provided to screen for major abnormalities, General surgery, urology, and orthopaedic surgery services are offered, Reproductive Medicine including IVF services are provided, Emergency care is available 24 hours a day for minor trauma and common emergencies, Paediatric outpatient clinics and inpatient paediatric care are offered, Dentistry services are provided with a dental chair and imaging facilities, On-site automated laboratory performing haematology and biochemistry investigations, Radiology imaging services including ultrasound and X-ray investigations
CAPABILITIES: Surgical Services, Emergency Care, Radiology Services, Dental Care, Laboratory Services
